title: Peruvian Black Bean Stew
description: A hearty Peruvian-inspired stew made with black beans, onions, garlic, and spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened.
Add peruvian seasoning; stir for 1 minute.
Add black beans, stew, and dense; stir to combine.
Bring to a boil; reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro (optional).
Let the stew rest for 10 minutes before serving.
